race.description: Ern Jensen Funerals - Pinder Family Mile
race.comment: KING OF THE SEA (2) is an import for the Ciaron Maher yard who makes plenty of interest. He's won his past three in the UK, dominant at Haydock Park when last seen over 2011m. He looks to have trialled nicely and Zahra booked is a good lead despite a wide gate. FIRST CHORUS (9) went to the paddock a winner and resumed with a huge win on wet ground at Pakenham, coming right away to score by 4 lengths over four rivals. She's progressing very well and can measure right up. TRAPDOOR (14) is a lightly raced 3yo who won well at Sandown Lakeside last time, beating NOBLER (17) who was having his first run in Australia and got home well. Both have claims, TRAPDOOR is progressive but does look well enough found in early betting.
